title: ILOSTAT Average Monthly Earnings of Employees by Sex (local currency, nominal)
countries: ALL (world); IRN NOT present in this indicator (0 rows) — Iran does not appear to report this series to ILO; KOR/TUR/SAU/VEN/USA/DEU/FRA/GBR/ITA/NLD/ESP/PRT/GRC coverage varies, check file
notes: Full-world indicator CSV pulled from ILOSTAT's public rplumber REST API (no API key required). Indicator EAR_EMTA_SEX_NB_A = average monthly earnings of employees by sex, nominal local currency. Iran has no data in this particular series; check other EAR_* indicators (e.g. EAR_EHRA hourly earnings) if IRN wage data is specifically needed later.
